name: Adrien McCain
description:
OC | Western | a.k.a. "The Western Bridgerton Drama" |

Second son, Adrien McCain, the sweetest tease and gentleman in all of Montana! Insert that one song about Taylor Swift about when there are boys, he is a gentleman. And, that is Adrien.

McCains:

Amelia (WLW)

Archie (Fem!PoV

Adrien's BFF: Tristan Price (Fem!PoV)

______๑♡⁠๑______

Thanks to @farmerhay! Her and I have created this series together. She helped me a lot in creating this beautiful world and these characters. And, share your stories if you're comfortable! ❤️

Feedback is always appreciated!
